<!-- Purpose: Standardize pull request summaries, validation notes, and self-review for TFRS repositories. -->
# Summary

Provide a concise explanation of the change.

# Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

# Files Changed

List the main files or directories touched.

# Testing Notes

Describe automated checks, manual validation, or why no tests were available.

# Checklist

- [ ] I self-reviewed the diff.
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed.
- [ ] I verified no secrets were introduced.
